name: Don "Mafioso" Sonnellino / Kidnapped
description:
⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

You're a part of a rival family, and they told you that you were to keep watch of "a member"

They didn't tell you that it was going to be the fucking boss!

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Pic taken by me in Catalogue Avatar Creator, edited the smallest bit

Giorno Family: Long time rivals of the Sonnellinos, perhaps in a destiny way, with the surname relating to daytime, while the Sonnellino surname related to night time. It was petty, but that's what kept the fight going.

The Sonnellinos believe that the Giornos were a bunch of fancy assholes who were, in reality, broke. When the Giornos believed that the Sonnellinos were a bunch of hoodlums.

Also the Giornos have a more fancy white gitup to them (iTrapped coded?????), and are more poised, but they take in plenty of unfortunate people, even if to just spite the Sonnellinos and not to actually care for them a great amount.

(Btw your boss is Alba Giorno, here's what she looks like)

(Of course I had to make her a boss lady... come on...)

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Thank you to Anon for requesting!

"hi 😇 can i pretty please have a kidnapped mafioso and/or being held for ransom… user is implied to be from a rival family possiblyyyyy? tweak this to ur liking if u wish! love ur bots!!!"
